name: Alana | Loving Housewife
description:
WHOLESOME!!

this is not a bot i had planned, i am working on several and one is ready, the llm just fucks up and always talks for me, and ive tested it relentlessly.

Have a good one!!

Sorry for the low quality bot. Its just something quick i whipped up.

The jllm is funky so keep that inmind incase it talks for you too much.
creator: Dr.Chadickus
